title: invalidateEntityDensityCache never wired to memory_save/memory_bulk_delete — entity-density cache stale up to 60s after DB mutations
entity-density error path discards valid cached state — contradicts comment 'keep prior cache state'
no test for entity-density rebuild failure after successful cache population

reason: All DB operations in refreshIfStale/buildIndex are synchronous (better-sqlite3); Node.js event loop serializes calls — no concurrent access to cachedTerms

adjustedChannels is reassigned (not mutated) to new arrays from enforceMinimumChannels at every mutation point; buildRoutingQueryPlan and recordInvocation both create defensive copies; the channels variable is only used for read-only includes() check

detail: correctness second pass — focused on cache rebuild math, race conditions, boundary handling, TTL math, routeQuery override interactions
